variants.title: Mann Filter WK 817/3 x Fuel Filter | Replaces the Donaldson P550473
variants.option1Value: Mann Filter WK 817/3 x Fuel Filter | Replaces the Donaldson P550473
variants.description: High-quality MANN-FILTER fuel filters remove unwanted and damaging dirt particles from the fuel and thus prevent possible damage. Thanks to the highest degree of separation and sealing, the fuel filter ensures functional reliability and optimum protection during the entire maintenance interval.
specifications: Style: Fuel Filter, Dimension A: 86.0 mm, Dimension B: 63.0 mm, Dimension C: 72.0 mm, Dimension G: M12x1.5-6H, Dimension H: 99.0 mm, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: SAE J1985, Outer Diameter: 86.3 mm, Length: 98.8 mm, Media Type: Cellulose, Thread: M12 x 1.5

variants.title: Donaldson P550473 Fuel Spin On
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P550473 Fuel Spin On is engineered to deliver reliable performance and durability across a wide range of applications. Designed with high-quality materials, it ensures consistent functionality while meeting demanding operational requirements. Whether used in industrial, automotive, or heavy-duty settings, this component offers dependable operation and longevity. Its versatile design makes it suitable for various uses, supporting system efficiency and overall performance.
specifications: Style: Fuel Spin On, Media: Cellulose, Efficiency 1: SAE J1985, Outer Diameter: 86.3 mm, Length: 98.8 mm, Thread: M12 x 1.5, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: SAE J1985, Media Type: Cellulose

variants.title: Fleetguard FF5373 Fuel Filter Filters/Fws | Replaces the Donaldson P550473
variants.option1Value: Fleetguard FF5373 Fuel Filter Filters/Fws | Replaces the Donaldson P550473
variants.description: Fleetguard® FF5373 premium spin-on fuel filter delivers superior performance using proven media technology, removing harmful contaminants. Fleetguard fuel filters ensure optimal fuel system protection to meet or exceed OEM specifications.
